optimization_suggestions.details: Your resume mentions key skills only 0.0 times on average. ATS systems prefer 2-3 mentions per keyword.
how_to_fix: Mention each key skill in: Skills section, Work Experience, and Summary
Use keywords naturally in context (e.g., 'Led Python development team')

optimization_suggestions.details: Save resume as .docx or .pdf (text-based, not scanned image). Avoid tables, text boxes, headers/footers.
optimization_suggestions.impact: Ensures ATS can read your resume
how_to_fix: Use simple formatting: no tables, columns, or text boxes
Use standard fonts: Arial, Calibri, Times New Roman
Save as .docx or text-based PDF (not scanned image)

optimization_suggestions.details: Include 'Data Analyst' in your resume. ATS systems prioritize exact job title matches.
how_to_fix: Add 'Data Analyst' to your professional summary
Use 'Data Analyst' as your LinkedIn headline
Mirror the exact job title from the posting

optimization_suggestions.details: Write both full term and acronym: 'Application Programming Interface (API)'. ATS searches for both.
how_to_fix: Include both in Skills: 'API, REST API, RESTful APIs'

quick_wins.details: Your resume mentions key skills only 0.0 times on average. ATS systems prefer 2-3 mentions per keyword.
how_to_fix: Mention each key skill in: Skills section, Work Experience, and Summary
Use keywords naturally in context (e.g., 'Led Python development team')
